context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements a Phoenix Blog context with a Comment schema and migration, following Ecto best practices: dual-layer constraints (DB + changeset), FK indexes, CRUD naming conventions, and a documented migration validation workflow. The web layer must not call Repo directly.

checklist.name: Schema timestamps
checklist.description: The Comment schema includes a `timestamps()` call inside the schema block

checklist.name: belongs_to association
checklist.description: The Comment schema declares `belongs_to :post` (or equivalent) to associate with the Post schema

checklist.name: Changeset cast and validate_required
checklist.description: The changeset/2 function uses `cast/3` followed by `validate_required/2`

checklist.name: validate_length on body
checklist.description: The changeset/2 function uses `validate_length` on the body field (with a max value)

checklist.name: validate_inclusion on status
checklist.description: The changeset/2 function uses `validate_inclusion` (or equivalent) to restrict the status field to allowed values

checklist.name: foreign_key_constraint in changeset
checklist.description: The changeset/2 function calls `foreign_key_constraint(:post_id)` (or equivalent FK field name)

checklist.name: DB foreign key constraint
checklist.description: The migration adds a database-level foreign key constraint (e.g. `references(:posts, on_delete: ...)` or explicit `add_foreign_key`)

checklist.name: DB check constraint on status
checklist.description: The migration includes a `check_constraint` or equivalent DB-level constraint restricting the status column values

checklist.name: FK index present
checklist.description: The migration creates an index on the foreign key column (`post_id`) — e.g. via `create index(:comments, [:post_id])`

checklist.name: Context CRUD naming
checklist.description: The Blog context module defines functions named `list_comments`, `get_comment!`, `update_comment`, and `delete_comment` (all four naming conventions present)

checklist.name: Repo not in web layer
checklist.description: No call to `Repo` (or `MyApp.Repo`) appears in any controller, LiveView, or router file — all Repo calls are inside the context module

checklist.name: Migration reversible
checklist.description: The migration uses `create table` with a matching implicit or explicit `drop_table` path (i.e. uses `change/0` instead of only `up/0`, or defines both `up/0` and `down/0`)

checklist.name: Migration validation workflow
checklist.description: MIGRATION_NOTES.md documents all three steps: `mix ecto.migrate`, `mix ecto.rollback`, `mix ecto.migrate` (in that order)

checklist.name: No combined schema+data migration
checklist.description: The migration file does NOT contain both DDL changes (create/alter table) and data backfill DML (INSERT/UPDATE statements) in the same file
